of.d:
prep. In a general sense, from, or out from; proceeding from;
   belonging to; relating to; concerning; -- used in a variety of
   applications; as:
prep. Denoting that from which anything proceeds; indicating
   origin, source, descent, and the like; as, he is of a race of kings; he
   is of noble blood.
prep. Denoting possession or ownership, or the relation of subject
   to attribute; as, the apartment of the consul: the power of the king; a
   man of courage; the gate of heaven.
prep. Denoting the material of which anything is composed, or that
   which it contains; as, a throne of gold; a sword of steel; a wreath of
   mist; a cup of water.
prep. Denoting part of an aggregate or whole;

a illegally beyond a prescribed line or area or ahead of the ball or puck

offsite.t: n. 装置外, 厂区外

offsites.t: (offsite 的复数) n. 装置外, 厂区外

offskip.d:
n. That part of a landscape which recedes from the spectator
   into distance.

offspeed.t: a. 比正常(或预料)速度慢的

offspring.t:
n. 子孙, 后代, 产物
[法] 后辈, 子孙, 后裔
offspring.d:
n. the immediate descendants of a person
n. something that comes into existence as a result

offsprings.t:
(offspring 的复数) n. 子孙, 后代, 产物
[法] 后辈, 子孙, 后裔
offsprings.d:
plural of offspring
n. the immediate descendants of a person
n. something that comes into existence as a result

offstage.t:
n. 台后, 幕内
a. 台后的, 幕内的
offstage.d:
a. situated or taking place in the area of a stage not visible to the audience
s. concealed from public view or attention
r. behind the scenes; not on stage

offtake.t:
n. 购买, 消费, 排水渠
[经] 卖出

offtakes.t:
(offtake 的复数) n. 购买, 消费, 排水渠
[经] 卖出

offwhite.t:
n. 灰白色，米色
adj. 灰白色的

ofgem.t: [网络] 电力市场办公室；气和电力市场办公室；英国能源监管机构

oficina.t: [地名] [委内瑞拉] 奥菲西纳

ofl.t: abbr. official 官方的，正式的

ofloxacin.t: [医]氧氟沙星：广谱抗菌药，作用与诺氟沙星(norfloxacin)相似，对革兰氏阴性细菌广泛有效，口服治疗直肠炎、性病以及下呼吸道、尿路和皮肤感染、眼科外用治疗细菌性角膜溃疡

ofm.t: abbr. Order of Friars Minor （天主教）小兄弟会

ofo.t: [网络] 奥福美国医学研究卫星(Orbiting Frog Otolith)；欧富；净油系统

ofor.t: abbr. operational forced outage rate 运行故障停用率

ofr.t: abbr. off frequency rejection 偏离频率滤去

ofri.t: abbr. optical Faraday rotation isolator 光学法拉第旋转隔离器

ofs.t: abbr. offices 办公室，办事处; one-function sketch 单功能草图

ofsted.t: 教育标准局（英国负责评鉴学校标准的政府部门）

oft.d: r many times at short intervals

often.d: r. in many cases or instances

oftener.t:
adv. 经常, 常常；往往, 在许多场合
a. [古语]经常的, 常常的
oftener.d: r more often or more frequently

oftentimes.d: r many times at short intervals

ofter.t:
adv. [古语、诗歌用语] =often [现多用于构成复合词] oft-told 常讲的
a. [废语] =often

ofttimes.d: r many times at short intervals

ofuro.t: n. (日本人用的)大浴盆,大浴桶

ofus.t: abbr. orbit frequency utilization simulation 轨道频率实用模拟
